name: BLACK BASEBALL CAP - PE-001
description:
Prince Esquire black baseball cap - quality cotton headwear with comfortable fit for everyday casual and streetwear looks.

Key features:
• Black durable cotton, wool, or straw construction depending on style.
• Classic six-panel crown with curved or flat brim.
• Clean minimalist design suitable for versatile styling.
• Embroidered ventilation eyelets on crown panels.
• Adjustable strap or snap closure for flexible fit.
• Prince Esquire quality finish for lasting everyday wear.

Fit & styling: Wear with tees, hoodies, polos, and denim for effortless casual style. A versatile finishing piece for streetwear and weekend outfits.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

name: GREY GLEN PLAID TWEED TRILBY HAT
description:
Grey glen plaid tweed trilby with striped band - heritage British-inspired headwear for autumn and winter styling.

Key features:
• Warm wool tweed glen plaid pattern.
• Short upturned trilby brim.
• Black band with grey stripe accents.
• Indented crown with classic silhouette.
• Fully lined interior for comfort.
• Durable structured weave.

Fit & styling: Pairs with overcoats, tweed blazers, and boots for Peaky Blinders-inspired heritage looks.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

Available sizes 56-59 cm. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

name: BEIGE BASEBALL CAP - PE-044
description:
Prince Esquire beige baseball cap - quality cotton headwear with comfortable fit for everyday casual and streetwear looks.

Key features:
• Beige durable cotton, wool, or straw construction depending on style.
• Classic six-panel crown with curved or flat brim.
• Clean minimalist design suitable for versatile styling.
• Embroidered ventilation eyelets on crown panels.
• Adjustable strap or snap closure for flexible fit.
• Prince Esquire quality finish for lasting everyday wear.

Fit & styling: Wear with tees, hoodies, polos, and denim for effortless casual style. A versatile finishing piece for streetwear and weekend outfits.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

name: MITCHELL & NESS YANKEES LEATHER DAD HAT
description:
Mitchell & Ness premium leather dad hat with New York Yankees branding - luxury heritage MLB cap with a soft unstructured fit.

Key features:
• Genuine leather crown with supple hand-feel.
• Embroidered Yankees NY logo on front.
• Unstructured low-profile dad-hat silhouette.
• Curved brim with tonal stitching.
• Mitchell & Ness heritage quality finish.
• Adjustable strap for one-size comfort.

Fit & styling: Elevate casual outfits with this premium leather cap. Works with denim, leather jackets, and elevated streetwear.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

name: BLACK UNDER ARMOUR ISO-CHILL STRETCH FIT HAT
description:
Under Armour Iso-Chill ArmourVent stretch-fit hat - cooling performance cap for training, running, and hot-weather activity.

Key features:
• Iso-Chill fabric for cooling comfort.
• ArmourVent mesh panels for airflow.
• Stretch-fit flexible construction.
• Black athletic profile with UA branding.
• Curved brim with lightweight build.
• Sweat-wicking headband.

Fit & styling: Built for workouts, hiking, and performance athleisure.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

name: WHITE UNDER ARMOUR DRIVER CAP 3.0
description:
Under Armour Driver Cap 3.0 in academy white - lightweight performance headwear built for golf, sport, and active casual wear.

Key features:
• UA lightweight breathable fabric.
• Structured low-profile driver cap shape.
• Moisture-wicking interior band.

• Adjustable back closure.

Fit & styling: Ideal for golf, outdoor training, and sporty smart-casual outfits.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

name: KHAKI MILITARY DESIGN COTTON CAP
description:
Khaki military-design cotton cap - rugged field-style headwear with structured profile for outdoor and casual wear.

Key features:
• Khaki brown durable cotton twill.
• Military-inspired front panel design.
• Structured crown with curved brim.
• Ventilation eyelets.
• Adjustable back strap.
• One-size versatile fit.

Fit & styling: Style with cargo pants, boots, and utility jackets for tactical-casual looks.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

name: 47 BRAND MVP BASEBALL CAP
description:

• Navy cotton twill six-panel crown.
• Curved brim with contrast stitching.
• MVP collection quality embroidery.

name: NEW ERA YANKEES CREAM & NAVY TWO-TONE BASEBALL CAP
description:
New Era New York Yankees two-tone baseball cap - cream crown with navy brim and raised NY logo for classic MLB street style.

Key features:
• Cream off-white crown panels with navy curved brim.
• Raised navy Yankees NY front embroidery.
• New Era flag logo on left side panel.
• Structured six-panel build with pre-curved visor.
• Breathable embroidered eyelets.
• Adjustable strap closure at back.

Fit & styling: Wear with streetwear, athleisure, or casual weekend outfits. Iconic team cap for fans and collectors.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

name: HANDWOVEN ECUADOR CLASSIC PANAMA HAT
description:
Authentic handwoven Ecuador Panama hat in natural straw - breathable summer elegance for resort, travel, and warm-weather occasions.

Key features:
• Traditional handwoven toquilla straw.
• Classic wide brim for sun protection.
• Lightweight breathable construction.
• Natural cream finish with fine weave.
• Interior comfort band.
• Rollable packable travel-friendly design.

Fit & styling: Essential for linen suits, resort wear, and garden parties. A timeless warm-weather statement.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

Available sizes 56-60 cm. Exclusively at Prince Esquire.
